title: Project Watcher Config
description: Configuration for Project Watcher local Git repository reporting.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema URL for editor validation.

paths.description: Repository paths or parent directories to scan. Relative paths resolve from the config file directory.

maxDepth.description: Maximum directory recursion depth when a path is a parent directory.

outputDir.description: Directory where reports are written. Relative paths resolve from the config file directory.

excludeDirs.description: Directory names to ignore while scanning files or discovering repositories.

excludeFiles.description: File names to ignore while counting files and LOC.

maxFileBytes.description: Maximum file size read for text/file-type statistics.

locTool.description: Line-count backend. Tracked mode only uses cloc externally because it can count git-tracked files directly.

countDuplicateFiles.description: Whether cloc should count duplicate files instead of de-duplicating them.

fileScope.description: Whether to count only git-tracked files or the full working tree after excludes.

maxSnapshots.description: Number of historical snapshots to retain. Set to 0 to retain all snapshots.
